title: McGraw Hill's Role in AI Education
description: A flowchart illustrating how McGraw Hill's educational resources serve as a foundational component in an introductory AI course.
elements: McGraw Hill Learning Platform (e.g., Connect, ALEKS)
Module 5: Core AI Concepts (e.g., Machine Learning, Neural Networks)
relationships: Student interacts with McGraw Hill Learning Platform to access Module 5 content
Platform delivers educational content and practical exercises on Core AI Concepts
This process facilitates Knowledge & Skills Acquisition for the student
The platform provides Assessment & Feedback to gauge understanding and reinforce learning
